# DEV-PLAN-284 patchset draft (prep-only)
#
# IMPORTANT:
# - This file is a planning artifact for 284-prep.
# - Do NOT add entries below into `patches/series` before readiness is met.
# - Readiness baseline: DEV-PLAN-223 + DEV-PLAN-260 frozen, DEV-PLAN-283 completed.

[0002-hook-submit-message-to-assistant-adapter.patch]
target:
- client/src/components/Chat/Input/ChatForm.tsx
- client/src/hooks/Messages/useSubmitMessage.ts
- client/src/hooks/Chat/useChatFunctions.ts
intent:
- take over send action at source level and stop page-level orchestration from driving business state
- route business requests through BFF/internal assistant APIs with one user-visible channel

[0003-restrict-local-fsm-and-consume-dto.patch]
target:
- client/src/hooks/Chat/useChatFunctions.ts
- client/src/hooks/SSE/useSSE.ts
- client/src/hooks/SSE/useEventHandlers.ts
intent:
- remove local re-derivation of business phase/candidate/commit constraints
- treat backend DTO as the only semantic source in frontend

[0004-unify-assistant-receipts-into-official-message-tree.patch]
target:
- client/src/hooks/SSE/useEventHandlers.ts
- client/src/components/Chat/Messages/ui/MessageRender.tsx
- client/src/components/Chat/Messages/Content/MessageContent.tsx
intent:
- all missing-field/candidate/confirm/commit receipts must become official assistant message entities
- no second stream, no DOM-injected receipt container

[0005-disable-legacy-helper-business-role.patch]
target:
- to be finalized by `scripts/librechat-web/scan-284-entrypoints.sh`
intent:
- disable/retire remaining helper paths that still try to own formal business progression
- keep helper logic as presentational adaptation only

[test skeleton linkage]
- e2e/tests/tp284-librechat-send-render-takeover.prep.spec.js
- cases currently `fixme`; switch to real assertions only after readiness gates are green
